title: Smoky Corn Skillet
description: A delicious and easy Indian-inspired dish made with smoked corn, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the skillet in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the deliciously seasoned oil and swirl to coat the skillet.
Add the smoked corn and cook until slightly charred, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded american cheese and stir until melted and combined with the corn.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Note: You can also add some chopped cilantro or scallions on top for extra flavor and color.
